source_record.title: Resistance Mechanisms to BCMA Targeting Bispecific Antibodies and CAR T-Cell Therapies in Multiple Myeloma.
source_record.study_context: Review of BCMA-targeted CAR T-cell therapies and bispecific antibodies in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma; PubMed abstract and metadata used for this v0 public extraction.

extracted_signals.signal_summary: The review frames BCMA-directed therapy resistance as multifactorial, including tumor-intrinsic, host-related, tumor-extrinsic, and tumor-microenvironment factors.
limitations: Review article; it does not provide a single quantitative extraction table in the public abstract.
Mechanism categories require source-by-source extraction before scoring.

extracted_signals.signal_summary: The review identifies therapy sequencing and prior exposure to BCMA-targeted bispecific or CAR T-cell therapies as fields that may influence subsequent treatment efficacy.
measurement_fields: sequence of bispecific antibody and CAR T exposure
limitations: Does not establish an optimal sequence.
Subsequent treatment efficacy cannot be inferred from review framing alone.

extracted_signals.signal_summary: The review names candidate strategies for overcoming resistance, including dual targeting, gamma-secretase inhibition, checkpoint blockade, armored CAR T constructs, and combinations.
limitations: Candidate strategy lists are not proof of clinical benefit.
Each strategy requires separate evidence level, disease-state scope, and safety review.
Do not use as a treatment recommendation.

extracted_signals.signal_summary: The review emphasizes deeper resistance-biology understanding supported by immune and genomic profiling to optimize therapeutic durability.
limitations: Profiling need does not specify a validated public minimum dataset.
Durability optimization remains a research framing question.
Needs expert review before being converted into a data-standard requirement.

what_this_supports: The mechanism map should stay multi-bucket rather than reducing relapse to antigen loss alone.
Public extraction records should include sequencing, immune profiling, genomic profiling, and microenvironment fields.
Candidate overcoming strategies should be tracked as hypotheses until source-specific evidence supports stronger claims.
what_this_does_not_support: It does not prove any resistance-overcoming strategy improves survival.
It does not rank CAR T-cell therapy versus bispecific antibodies.
It does not recommend therapy sequencing.
It does not establish a cure claim.

review_notes: Built from PubMed ESummary and EFetch metadata/abstract for PMID 40710330.
Use this extraction to guide fields and hypotheses, not mechanism frequency estimates.
